stories.title: The Open Championship 2026: The best sights, sound...
stories.summary: Can Ryan Fox or Sam Burns pass clubhouse leader Cameron Young? Check out the highlights from the final round of the Open Championship.

stories.title: Sources: Hawks acquire Dort in three-team trade
stories.summary: The Thunder are trading All-Defensive wing Luguentz Dort to the Hawks in a three-team deal that sends three second-round picks to OKC, former No. 1 pick Zaccharie Risacher to the Mavericks and Ryan Nembhard to Atlanta, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: RB Barkley, family OK after attempted burglary
stories.summary: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley and his family were unharmed after an attempted burglary of their home Saturday morning, according to the Tredyffrin Township Police Department.

stories.title: White: McGregor injured ACL, not thinking future
stories.summary: Conor McGregor offered more details on the right leg injury that ended his UFC return earlier this month, saying he suffered ACL and meniscus damage. He also expressed confidence that he could fight again by the summer of 2027.

stories.title: Ohtani won't pitch in Philly, mound return stalled...
stories.summary: Shohei Ohtani will not make his scheduled start Wednesday against the Phillies as he deals with irritation in his left knee.
